implementation_summary.summary: CP00-669 closes the RP22 External Integrations I synthetic fixture, test/golden, Hermes, Claude, and handoff tail while opening RP22.P02 service contract and type-shape descriptors over 150 planned units from RP22.P01.M06.S05 through RP22.P02.M02.S22. It keeps external provider API, OAuth, sync, message capture, e-sign, webhook, credential, persistence, permission, audit, UI, Hermes, and Claude runtimes closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-669 RP22.P01.M06.S05-RP22.P02.M02.S22 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
